meta.title: La Iaia – Home cooking, ready for today's world

hero.title: The kitchen of always, ready for today's world.
slides: The taste of tradition, ready for your table.
Market cuisine with the homemade flavour of always.
The food we love, the food that takes care of you.
First-class ingredients for an exceptional result.

sobre.title: A food company born from home cooking.
sobre.text1: We have a high-technology industrial kitchen dedicated exclusively to the production of market-style prepared dishes in large format.
sobre.text2: We transform traditional recipes into more than 35 varieties of prepared food, guaranteeing full process control and maximum quality in every portion.

alimentacio.title: La Iaia Food
alimentacio.text: We produce prepared dishes and fifth-range solutions for hospitality, retail, catering and distributors that need safe, consistent, quality products.

botigues.title: La Iaia Shops
botigues.text: We bring prepared food closer to the end consumer through physical shops, with dishes designed for eating well without sacrificing the convenience of daily life.

productes.title: Prepared dishes with flavour, consistency and trust.
productes.subtitle: More than 35 varieties made with first-class ingredients and controlled quality processes.

qualitat.title: Quality at every step.
qualitat.subtitle: Trust is built with rigorous processes, consistent product, and a way of working focused on guaranteeing safety, flavour and service.

items.title: Raw Material Selection
items.text: First-class ingredients, trusted suppliers and careful selection to guarantee exceptional flavour and results.

items.title: Rigour in Preparation
items.text: Same recipe, same flavour. We weigh and measure every ingredient to guarantee consistency across all our dishes.

items.title: Cutting-Edge Kitchen
items.text: We combine home-cooking methods with state-of-the-art equipment and cooking processes adapted to each recipe.

items.title: High-Protection Packaging
items.text: Protective atmosphere packaging to guarantee an 18-day shelf life without losing the organoleptic properties of the product.

items.title: Control Laboratory
items.text: A hygiene and disinfection plan that controls every phase of production, ensuring the highest safety standards.

items.title: Logistics & Cold Chain
items.text: Efficient distribution that never breaks the cold chain, keeping the product between 2°C and 4°C until delivery.

contacte.title: Tell us about your project.
contacte.subtitle: Whether you're looking for prepared dishes for your business or a practical solution for daily life, we're here to help.

form.ok_text: We will get back to you soon.

footer.tagline: We cook to make eating well easier.
